news.paragraph: Visa is expanding its product offerings with the UK rollout of the Visa Flexible Credential on Zilch cards. Conversely, the company faces potential regulatory scrutiny in Brazil as the Trump administration examines the country's instant payment system. Traders should weigh this product expansion against emerging international regulatory risks.
headlines: Brazil's beloved instant payment system faces scrutiny from the Trump administration
